body.title: Boredom idle loop — D272 milieu too-settled trigger + traversal
body.result: Implemented D272 boredom idle loop: boredom_idle.py tool (run_boredom_check), PROC_BOREDOM_TRIGGER habit (schedule_interval_sec=600). Milieu settled check (arousal<0.08, |valence|<0.15) → alternating EF question traversal / topics traversal → [Igor wonders] channel post. Rate-limited 15min. 567 tests pass.
body.description: Implement D272: (1) PROC_BOREDOM_TRIGGER habit on milieu too-settled threshold, (2) idle traversal: open threads -> EF questions tree -> topics tree (long-term projects stub pending design), (3) output to channel as Igor noticing or wondering. Depends on T-ef-tree-complete + T-topics-tree-seed.
